name: health-tracker
description: Personal health tracking plugin for individualized diet targets, meals, exercise, body composition, weight, and blood glucose logs.

interface.shortDescription: Set diet targets and track meals, workouts, body metrics, and glucose.
interface.longDescription: Health Tracker is a personal health plugin organized into four modules: exercise logging and coaching suggestions, personalized diet target setup plus nutrition structure analysis, body composition/body-weight tracking, and blood glucose tracking. The diet module asks for height, weight, work intensity, goals, and optional InBody/body-composition results on first use so daily calories and macros can be individualized. Protein powder estimates require a matching uploaded or typed nutrition label before precise calorie/macros are applied. It includes daily-nutrition-deficit-tracker, exercise-log-coach, body-composition-tracker, and blood-glucose-tracker. A local routing helper at scripts/route_health_skill.py documents how health log prompts map to the appropriate skill.
defaultPrompt: Use Health Tracker to set my personalized diet targets and log today's meals, workout, weight, and glucose.
Use $daily-nutrition-deficit-tracker to set my calorie and macro targets from my height, weight, work intensity, and InBody report.
Use $exercise-log-coach to summarize my monthly workouts.
Use $body-composition-tracker to compare my InBody and weight trend.
